interpretation: The adversarial sensitivity layer contains the ten predefined PH908 alternative-mask states.
claim_boundary: Completeness check only; not evidence of geographic origin, ethnic identity, population continuity, or migration route.

interpretation: All predefined alternative-mask states satisfy A_s > 1 and D < 0.
claim_boundary: Weak directional compatibility is not load-bearing by itself.

interpretation: No PH908 alternative-mask state enters the matched state-specific R1a-comparator envelope.
claim_boundary: Envelope failure is a specified model-test result, not a geographic-origin, ethnic-identity, population-continuity, or migration-route claim.

interpretation: Six states recover the matched R1a comparator state under the same sensitivity procedure.
claim_boundary: Positive-control recovery calibrates the stress test; it does not convert weak PH908 compatibility into load-bearing evidence.

tested_quantity: Smallest source-adequacy multiplier still needed to reach the matched R1a-comparator source-adequacy threshold
interpretation: Even the least separated PH908 alternative-mask state remains below the matched R1a-comparator source-adequacy threshold.
claim_boundary: Visibility burden is not a population-size estimate and not a correction that infers PH908 origin.

interpretation: The equal-n rarefaction trace contains two source layers, two matched R1a comparators, three boundary contexts, and four equal-n settings.
claim_boundary: Completeness check only; not a universal all-grid validation claim.

interpretation: The full grid is not uniformly positive, so the panel must not be described as a universal all-grid pass.
claim_boundary: Failure cells are interpreted as adequacy or denominator limits, not broad reversal.

interpretation: Most failures are concentrated at the lowest common-n setting.
claim_boundary: Common-n thresholds are adequacy diagnostics, not universal decision gates unless separately predefined.

interpretation: All scoreable cells at common-n >= 50 remain positive in this adequacy sensitivity trace.
claim_boundary: This supports a power interpretation of low-common-n failures; it is not a universal all-grid pass or geographic-origin claim.

interpretation: All failed cells in this trace occur at common-n 20 or 30.
claim_boundary: This supports an adequacy and denominator-limit interpretation; it is not a universal validation claim or geographic-origin claim.

interpretation: The synthetic degradation trace contains two matched R1a comparators, six audited branch-resolution layers, and six retained source-visibility fractions.
claim_boundary: Completeness check only; this is an operating-characteristic stress test rather than a population-size estimate.

tested_quantity: Synthetic degradation basic-compatible states at retained source visibility 100 percent
interpretation: At full retained source visibility the matched R1a positive controls remain basic-compatible in ten of twelve branch-layer states.
claim_boundary: Synthetic degradation checks comparator operating characteristics; it does not identify PH908 origin or route.

tested_quantity: Synthetic degradation basic-compatible states at retained source visibility 25 percent
interpretation: At retained source visibility 25 percent all tested comparator states fall below the source-country visibility gate in this deterministic stress test.
claim_boundary: The failure boundary is a visibility-stress result and not a historical population-size estimate.

tested_quantity: Synthetic degradation no-call states at retained source visibility <= 25 percent
interpretation: All comparator states at retained source visibility 25 percent or lower are no-calls after the source-country visibility gate is applied.
claim_boundary: The no-call boundary is a visibility-stress result and not a PH908-like compatibility result.

tested_quantity: Synthetic degradation rows with PH908-like source adequacy
interpretation: No degraded matched R1a comparator row reaches the PH908 reference source-adequacy state in this deterministic grid.
claim_boundary: This does not estimate population size or infer PH908 geographic origin, ethnic identity, population continuity, chronology, or migration route.

interpretation: The primary-layer reversal inset carries source-adequacy and source-diversity sensitivity bounds from the audited source table.
claim_boundary: Primary reversal values are sensitivity bounds only; not population-size estimates, bias corrections, geographic-origin claims, ethnic-identity claims, population-continuity claims, or migration-route claims.
